element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Practiced against increasingly skilled opponents in arcade mode
Used for mobility and aerial combat options against advancing opponents
Integrated into aggressive offense strategies in mid-game

element_introduction_order.element: Character transformation (appearance and fighting style change)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Advanced tactical option executed through specific throwing moves in late-game
Customized per character in training; deployed strategically against boss characters
Unplayable character requiring mastery of all prior mechanics to defeat

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tournament bracket progression with escalating difficulty; tension builds through sequential matches leading to climactic boss encounter

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches against weaker Gōketsuji clan members establish core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tournament progression introduces opponents with diverse fighting styles and transformation capabilities
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final matches against increasingly superhuman opponents (Oume Gōketsuji unplayable boss requires mastery of all mechanics)
notable_spikes: Introduction of character with transformation mechanics as opponent
Final match against Oume Gōketsuji (palette-swap boss with superhuman abilities)

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear sequence of 1v1 matches progressing toward final boss; each victory unlocks narrative ending for character
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Arcade Mode - full tournament run to Oume Gōketsuji

notable_level_patterns.description: High-tension pattern: defeat consecutive opponents with single life bar; escalating difficulty without narrative breaks
Player-versus-player focused mode; mechanical mastery emphasized over narrative progression
Safe context for learning: element introduction without time pressure or opponent threat
